_notes.copyTo: Copy file nay thanh members/<member_id>/config.json roi dien thong tin rieng cua tung nguoi. Copy state.example.json thanh members/<member_id>/state.json.

fieldGuide.auth.common.clientId: Client id trong token request. Neu dung Teams web mac dinh thi thuong la 5e3ce6c0-2b1f-4285-8d4b-75ee78787346.
fieldGuide.auth.common.brkClientId: Gia tri brk_client_id trong token request neu request co brk fields. Thuong giong Teams web client id.
fieldGuide.auth.common.anchorMailbox: Gia tri X-AnchorMailbox trong token/search request, dang Oid:<user-oid>@<tenant-id>.
fieldGuide.auth.common.refreshToken: Refresh token lay tu request oauth2/v2.0/token cua Teams web client 5e3ce6c0. Token nay co the dung de doi sang spaces/substrate/ic3 bang scope rieng.
fieldGuide.author.from: Gia tri from trong payload post/reply Teams, dang 8:orgid:<user-oid>.
fieldGuide.author.fromUserId: Thuong giong author.from. Neu khong dien, script se fallback ve author.from.
fieldGuide.teams.threadId: Conversation/channel thread id trong URL/API chatsvc, dang 19:...@thread.tacv2.
fieldGuide.teams.teamId: Team id trong API/list posts/search query, dang 19:...@thread.tacv2.
fieldGuide.schedule.days: Danh sach ngay duoc report. Neu bo trong hoac khong khai bao, script chi keepalive token va khong post report.

tokenGuide.primaryRefreshToken: Uu tien lay refresh_token trong response cua request token co client_id=5e3ce6c0-2b1f-4285-8d4b-75ee78787346. Scope co the la api.spaces.skype.com hoac substrate.office.com.
tokenGuide.spaces: Script se dung primary refresh token de lay access token aud=https://api.spaces.skype.com.
tokenGuide.substrate: Script se dung primary refresh token de lay access token aud=https://substrate.office.com, dung de search parent post.
tokenGuide.ic3: Script se dung primary refresh token de lay access token aud=https://ic3.teams.office.com va scp=Teams.AccessAsUser.All, dung de tao parent post va reply report.
tokenGuide.fallback: Neu mot profile test-auth fail, them refreshToken rieng vao auth.<profile>.refreshToken.
tokenGuide.firstRun: Truong auth.<profile>.token se duoc script tu ghi lai sau khi refresh thanh cong.
tokenGuide.commonSync: Moi khi spaces refresh thanh cong va nhan refresh_token moi, script se cap nhat lai auth.common.refreshToken theo spaces.

progressGuide.startPercent: Phan tram hien tai truoc khi cong tien do cho ngay report.
progressGuide.dailyIncreaseRange: Moi ngay random mot gia tri trong khoang nay va luu vao dailyPlans[date].taskIncreases.
progressGuide.progressAppliedTasks: Script tu tao dailyPlans[date].progressAppliedTasks sau khi post thanh cong de khong cong trung.

reportNumberGuide.numberTemplate: Mac dinh T{MM}/{REPORT_INDEX}/{MONTH_WORKDAYS}. REPORT_INDEX tung ngay duoc luu trong state.postedReports, summary thang nam trong state.monthlyReports.
reportNumberGuide.skipDates: Neu nghi mot ngay lam viec, them YYYY-MM-DD vao schedule.skipDates de khong tang so report va khong tinh vao tong ngay lam.
reportNumberGuide.extraWorkDates: Neu lam bu vao ngay ngoai schedule.days, them YYYY-MM-DD vao schedule.extraWorkDates.
reportNumberGuide.initialReportedWorkdays: Tuy chon. Dung de seed so ngay da report truoc khi bat dau dung bot giua thang.

teams.searchTitleTemplate: ADVANCE UAV NAVIGATION SYSTEM - Bao cao ngay {DD}/{MM}/{YYYY}
teams.parentPostContentTemplate: ADVANCE UAV NAVIGATION SYSTEM - Bao cao ngay {DD}/{MM}/{YYYY}

tasks.title: Kiem thu va sua loi tinh nang B
